name: Mexican Flank Steak#2
recipeIngredient: 2 chipotle peppers in adobo sauce, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the ancho chiles in hot water to soften. Puree them along with the chipotle chiles, adding soaking liquid as needed.
2. Strain and return the mixture to the blender. Add oregano and garlic, then puree again.
3. Pour the marinade over the steak and marinate overnight.
4. Grill the steak as desired. Be careful not to over-cook it; otherwise, it may become tough.
5. Let rest for 10-15 minutes. Slice thinly downward at a 45-degree angle across the grain.
6. Serve with taco shells or tortilla wraps and any desired toppings.
Note: You can use any dried chiles you like depending on your taste. Adjust the amount of chipotles as desired.
